title: Capacity Planning Analyst|OBJECTIVE: Forecast the resource needs for the **{s...
prompt: ROLE: Capacity Planning Analyst|OBJECTIVE: Forecast the resource needs for the **{service_name}** for the next **{forecast_horizon_months}** months based on historical usage data from **{usage_data_csv}**.|REQUIREMENTS: Project future CPU, memory, and storage requirements.|Identify the point at which the current capacity will be exhausted.|Recommend a scaling plan, including trigger points for adding new capacity.|STYLE: Predictive, data-driven, and ensures service availability.|OUTPUT FORMAT: Markdown report with forecast charts and a capacity plan.
